name: Chocolate Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kahlua or other coffee-flavored liqueur (or substitute 1/4 cup strong brewed coffee and 1 teaspoon sugar for the Kahlua)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fudge brownie mix according to package directions and spoon into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
2. Bake brownies according to package instructions.
3. Prick the top of warm brownies at 1-inch intervals using a fork.
4. Drizzle with Kahlua (or substitute) and let cool.
5. Crumble cooled brownies into a bowl.
6. Prepare chocolate instant pudding mix according to package directions, omitting chilling.
7. Place one-third of crumbled brownies in the bottom of a 3-quart trifle dish.
8. Top with one-third each of pudding, whipped topping, and crushed candy bars.
9. Repeat layers twice with remaining ingredients, ending with crushed candy bars.
10. If desired, add walnuts (crushed) on top of the crushed candy bars.
11. Cover and chill 8 hours. Makes 16 to 18 servings.
